# Story 6.3: BE — Tables CRUD Endpoints

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-25. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As an admin,
I want CRUD endpoints cho bàn (`/api/v1/tables`),
so that tôi có thể quản lý bàn trong từng khu vực, cấu hình capacity/sort/toggle active cho table-service mode (FR46).

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given Story 6.1 schema và Story 6.2 `TablesModule` đã có `AreasController`, when triển khai Story 6.3, then thêm `TablesController` vào cùng module với routes:
   - `GET /api/v1/tables` → cashier + admin được phép; list tables scoped store; optional query `?areaId=<uuid>`; sort `sortOrder ASC, name ASC`; 200 OK array.
   - `POST /api/v1/tables` → admin only; body `{ name, areaId, capacity?, sortOrder?, isActive? }`; 201 Created + entity.
   - `PATCH /api/v1/tables/:id` → admin only; partial update (`name?`, `areaId?`, `capacity?`, `sortOrder?`, `isActive?`); 200 OK + entity.
   - `DELETE /api/v1/tables/:id` → admin only; hard delete khi không có active order guard; 204 No Content.

2. Given DTO validation, when client gửi payload, then:
   - `name`: required on POST, string, 1–100 chars.
   - `areaId`: required on POST, UUID string; optional on PATCH để move bàn sang area khác.
   - `capacity`: optional integer ≥ 1, default 2 on POST.
   - `sortOrder`: optional integer ≥ 0, default 0 on POST.
   - `isActive`: optional boolean, default `true` on POST.
   - PATCH body rỗng `{}` → 400 RFC 7807 `type=https://pos.example/errors/validation`.

3. Given response shape, when client nhận table entity, then return camelCase fields tối thiểu: `id`, `areaId`, `name`, `capacity`, `sortOrder`, `isActive`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`; KHÔNG leak `tenantId`/`storeId`.

4. Given `areaId` trong POST/PATCH hoặc query filter, when validate, then area phải thuộc tenant+store hiện tại qua scoped lookup:
   - Cross-tenant/cross-store/nonexistent `areaId` trong body → 400 RFC 7807 `type=https://pos.example/errors/validation`, `detail="Area không thuộc store"`.
   - `GET /tables?areaId=<id-của-store-khác>` → 400 validation cùng detail (không leak tables).

5. Given table name unique trong store (`uq_tables_tenant_store_name`), when POST/PATCH gây duplicate (Prisma `P2002`), then return 409 RFC 7807 với `type=https://pos.example/errors/table-name-conflict`, title `Tên bàn đã tồn tại`, detail tiếng Việt; `sortOrder` duplicate được phép.

6. Given DELETE table, when table có order chưa void trong ngày hiện tại (`orders.table_id = id`, `synced_at >= start-of-day Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh converted to UTC`, và không tồn tại row `order_voids` cho order), then block delete với 409 RFC 7807:
   - `type=https://pos.example/errors/table-has-pending-order`
   - `title=Bàn đang có đơn chưa tất toán`
   - `detail=Bàn đang có {activeOrderCount} đơn trong ngày; hãy xử lý/hủy đơn trước khi xóa.`
   - extension field `activeOrderCount` number.
   Note: DB hiện không có `OrderStatus`; không invent enum `pending_sync/synced` ở backend. “Pending order” cho Story 6.3 được derive từ synced orders chưa void trong current business day, consistent với `/tables/status` Story 6.4.

7. Given RBAC, when caller role cashier, then `GET /api/v1/tables` allowed; POST/PATCH/DELETE forbidden 403 RFC 7807. Admin allowed all.

8. Given multi-tenant isolation, when admin store A calls `GET/PATCH/DELETE /tables/<id-của-store-B>`, then return empty list for list filters or 404 for id mutation/detail lookup; never leak cross-tenant existence; no raw SQL.

9. Given OpenAPI/Swagger, when viewing `/api/docs`, then `TablesController` has `@ApiTags('tables')`, `@ApiBearerAuth()`, DTO schemas/examples, 400/403/404/409 examples for validation, name conflict, and `table-has-pending-order`.

10. Given Problem Details constants, when implementing, then extend `pos-api/src/common/errors/problem-types.ts` with:
    - `tableHasPendingOrder: 'https://pos.example/errors/table-has-pending-order'`
    - `tableNameConflict: 'https://pos.example/errors/table-name-conflict'`
    Do not rename existing `areaHasTables`/`areaNameConflict`.

11. Given unit tests, when run `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables`, then coverage ≥70% for controller/service with happy path, validation, name conflict, invalid/cross-store area, delete guard, RBAC metadata, cross-tenant not-found, missing context.

12. Given regression gates, when run from `pos-api/`, then PASS: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables`, `npm test`, `npm run build`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Extend Problem Types (AC: 5, 6, 10)
  - [x] Add `tableHasPendingOrder` and `tableNameConflict` to `PROBLEM_TYPES` near area/table domain constants.
  - [x] Keep existing keys unchanged; do not alter `ProblemDetailsFilter` unless tests prove extension fields are dropped.

- [x] Create Table DTOs (AC: 2, 9)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/dto/create-table.dto.ts`: `CreateTableDto` with `name`, `areaId`, `capacity?`, `sortOrder?`, `isActive?` using class-validator + Swagger decorators.
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/dto/update-table.dto.ts`: `PartialType(CreateTableDto)`.
  - [x] NEW query DTO optional if preferred: `list-tables-query.dto.ts` with `areaId? @IsUUID()`; otherwise validate query in controller/service explicitly.

- [x] Create Tables Repository (AC: 1, 3, 4, 6, 8)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/tables.repository.ts` (flat structure, consistent with Story 6.2).
  - [x] Export `TableRecord` `{ id, areaId, name, capacity, sortOrder, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt }`.
  - [x] Reuse local `tenantScopedClient` pattern from `areas.repository.ts`; do not import repository helpers from `menu`.
  - [x] Methods:
    - [x] `list(context, areaId?)`: scoped `table.findMany({ where: areaId ? { areaId } : {}, select, orderBy: [{sortOrder:'asc'}, {name:'asc'}] })`.
    - [x] `findById(context, id, client?)`: scoped `findFirst({ where: { id }, select })`.
    - [x] `areaExists(context, areaId, client?)`: scoped `area.findFirst({ where: { id: areaId }, select: { id: true } })`.
    - [x] `create(context, dto, client)`: create with `uuidv7()`, explicit `tenantId/storeId`, defaults `capacity=2`, `sortOrder=0`, `isActive` omitted when undefined.
    - [x] `update(context, id, dto, client)`: `updateMany({ where: { id }, data })` guard then refetch scoped; return null if count != 1.
    - [x] `delete(context, id, client)`: scoped `deleteMany({ where: { id } })` after existence check; return existing or null.
    - [x] `countActiveOrdersForToday(context, tableId, todayStartUtc, client)`: scoped count orders with `tableId`, `syncedAt >= todayStartUtc`, and `voids: { none: {} }`.

- [x] Create Tables Service (AC: 1, 4, 5, 6, 8)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/tables.service.ts` injecting `TablesRepository` + `PrismaService`.
  - [x] `list(context, query)`: ensure context; if `areaId` supplied validate area belongs to store before listing; return sorted list.
  - [x] `create(context, dto)`: ensure context; validate area; transaction; map duplicate name P2002 → `table-name-conflict`.
  - [x] `update(context, id, dto)`: reject empty body with validation; find table scoped or 404; if `areaId` supplied validate; update; map duplicate.
  - [x] `delete(context, id)`: find table scoped or 404; compute start of current day in `Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh` (UTC+7, no DST) then count active orders; if count >0 throw `table-has-pending-order` with `activeOrderCount`; otherwise delete.
  - [x] Keep no MenuVersion bump; areas/tables are not menu data.

- [x] Create Tables Controller (AC: 1, 7, 9)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/tables.controller.ts` with `@Controller('tables')`, `@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)`.
  - [x] `GET @Roles('cashier','admin')`; `POST/PATCH/DELETE @Roles('admin')`.
  - [x] Add Swagger examples for success + validation + 409 conflicts.

- [x] Wire TablesModule (AC: 1)
  - [x] Edit `pos-api/src/tables/tables.module.ts`: add `TablesController`, `TablesService`, `TablesRepository` alongside areas providers.
  - [x] Do not add a new module; do not change global prefix/bootstrap.

- [x] Unit Tests (AC: 11)
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/tables.service.spec.ts` covering missing context, create defaults, area validation, update move area, empty patch validation, duplicate name, delete guard active orders, delete success, cross-tenant scoped miss.
  - [x] NEW `pos-api/src/tables/tables.controller.spec.ts` covering delegation, roles metadata, DTO validation (invalid UUID, capacity 0, sortOrder -1, isActive string), and query `areaId` validation if implemented via DTO.
  - [x] Update existing module/controller tests only as necessary for new providers; keep Story 6.2 areas tests passing.

- [x] Regression Gates (AC: 12)
  - [x] From `pos-api/`: run and record `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand src/tables`, `npm test`, `npm run build`.

## Dev Notes

### Source Requirements

- Story source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md` Story 6.3 — `/api/v1/tables` CRUD, `areaId` FK validation, capacity ≥1, `table-has-pending-order` guard.
- Sprint Change Proposal: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/sprint-change-proposal-2026-05-25.md` — dependency order 6.1 → 6.2/6.3/6.4; Story 6.3 files and scope.
- Architecture: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` — `src/tables/` module, endpoints `/areas`, `/tables`, `/tables/status`, `/stores/me`; no table config version for MVP.
- Project rules: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` — NestJS 11, Prisma 7, RFC 7807, tenant `$extends`, Controller → Service → Repository → PrismaService, no raw unscoped SQL.

### Current Code State (must preserve)

- Story 6.1 is `done`: Prisma models `Area` and `Table` exist; `Table` fields are `id`, `tenantId`, `storeId`, `areaId`, `name`, `capacity`, `sortOrder`, `isActive`, timestamps; unique `(tenantId, storeId, name)`; `Order.tableId` and `Order.tableNameSnapshot` exist.
- Story 6.2 is `done`: `pos-api/src/tables/` exists with flat files `areas.controller.ts`, `areas.service.ts`, `areas.repository.ts`, DTOs, specs, and `tables.module.ts`; `AppModule` already imports `TablesModule`.
- Existing `AreasRepository` has a reusable local tenant-scope pattern. Mirror it for tables instead of creating a `repositories/` subfolder mid-epic.
- Existing backend `Order` model has no status enum. Void state is represented by `order_voids`. Do not reference nonexistent backend `OrderStatus.PendingSync/Synced` in code.

### Architecture Guardrails

- **Layering:** Controller → Service → Repository → PrismaService. Controller does not call repo; service owns validation and business rules.
- **Multi-tenant:** wrap every business query with `runWithTenantContext(context, ...)` and use `$extends(tenantScopeExtension)` for transactional clients. Avoid `findUnique({ where: { id } })` for business records; use scoped `findFirst` + guarded `updateMany/deleteMany`.
- **RFC 7807:** throw Nest exceptions with payload `{ type, title, detail, ...extra }`; never return `{ success, message, code }`.
- **Snapshot immutability:** Do not update `orders.tableNameSnapshot`; Story 6.3 only guards table delete.
- **No menu bump:** Table/area config is not menu data and has no `menuVersion` bump.
- **No raw SQL:** Aggregate/count can be Prisma relation filters; raw SQL is unnecessary.

### Existing Patterns to Mirror

- `pos-api/src/tables/areas.service.ts` and `areas.repository.ts`: exact transaction, `ensureContext`, scoped update/delete guard, P2002 mapping patterns.
- `pos-api/src/menu/services/categories.service.ts` and `repositories/categories.repository.ts`: mature CRUD conflict pattern; ignore MenuVersion bump for tables.
- `pos-api/src/tables/areas.controller.spec.ts`: roles metadata and DTO validation test style.

### Previous Story Intelligence

- Story 6.2 resolved a file-structure conflict by using flat `src/tables/*.ts` files, despite architecture examples showing subfolders. Continue flat structure in 6.3 to avoid churn; defer any folder refactor until Epic 6 has enough controllers to justify it.
- Story 6.2 added `areaHasTables`/`areaNameConflict`; 6.3 should add table equivalents, not reuse area error types.
- Recent commits: `df5e6a0` completed schema foundation, `b508fba` completed areas CRUD, `88e952a` fixed e2e tests. Preserve these patterns and gates.

### Out of Scope

- Do not implement `/api/v1/tables/status`, `/api/v1/stores/me`, or orders DTO `tableId/tableNameSnapshot` validation/persist — Story 6.4.
- Do not implement FE admin pages — Story 6.5.
- Do not add migrations/schema changes — Story 6.1 already did.
- Do not add realtime table locking; MVP accepts two POS selecting same table offline.
